/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/rps.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rps.dir/Users/erenkutsal/courses/comp410/util/InitShader.cpp.o -o rps  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib
